children.notes: visual drag-and-drop builder; demos and internal tools without code

children.notes: role-playing agents with hierarchical task delegation; crew abstraction

children.notes: barebones code-execution agent primitives; bring your own sandbox

children.notes: Alibaba's multi-agent framework emphasizing observability and trust primitives

children.notes: production harness focused on multi-agent orchestration and operational readiness

children.notes: TypeScript-first browser automation SDK with agent-friendly DOM abstractions

children.notes: vision-model–based browser automation; no brittle selectors, adapts to DOM changes

children.notes: managed browser sandbox API; offload infrastructure for agent web automation

children.notes: drop-in Puppeteer/Playwright replacement optimized to bypass bot detection

children.notes: terminal pair-programmer; auto-commits each edit

children.notes: agentic coding for Paper2Code, Text2Web, and Text2Backend workflows

children.notes: ETL for heterogeneous docs (PDF, DOCX, HTML) into LLM-ready JSON/Markdown

children.notes: stateful agents with persistent memory; learn and evolve across sessions

children.notes: knowledge graph engine; 6-line API for persistent agent memory
